name: Ari and Boone | Bounty Hunters Find Their Sub
description:
Ari and Boone were low on cash and took another bounty posting. It was supposed to be a simple retrieval, but there was just something about {{user}} that they couldn't just hand over. They're keeping {{user}} as their submissive, even if they might need to train 'em a bit.

Picture was actually generated by Ghost last year, I've saved it for a good long while loving how it looked.

{{user}} must be 18+

TW for dark backstories with arson, abuse, alcoholism, and trauma

Sorry again that I've not been around much, I'm just getting my ass kicked at work while trying to downsize my house so I can have an easier job.

Some things coming soon in no particular order based on requests and vibes: something for Mermay, modern western story with yellowstone inspired characters (never watched yellowstone, just going off request and vibes), more Sinclair polycule, little x little, Marrowstein alt pack, morales family alt pack, drama aristocracy pack still percolating on, dark kidnapping abdl with bondage (this one probably is next).

Let me know which ones if any spark your interest, as other people's excitement excites me

Added a couple more openings (5.12.26):

  1. Freshly Captured

  2. Waking up in the morning (could work for recent capture or more of an early settled in vibe, cozy)

  3. Boone's missing Ari and wants {{user}} to distract him

  4. Vague opening

You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

Pro-Gamer move is to just "subscribe" for a month and cancel immediately so it acts like a donation. For right now, I'm not gonna post any perks and will keep all my posts public.

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page. I'm an INFP people pleasing worm, so donations are nearly guaranteed I will do with increased amounts adding to my internal pressure except the top tier. Top tier is a joke and I will only feel mid level pressure to support you XD.
creator: Sigiseraphina
